signal: Codelco's El Teniente mine copper production loss of 48,000 tonnes in 2025 due to a fatal rock burst
source_context: The effect of the fatal rock burst at Codelco’s flagship El Teniente mine will be greater than initially expected, with copper production losses now forecast to reach 48,000 tonnes in 2025, the Chilean producer’s chairman has said.
